Class BooleanVerifierImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,Boolean>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractBooleanVerifier<BooleanVerifier,BooleanValidator>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.BooleanVerifierImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BooleanVerifier, ExtensibleBooleanVerifier<BooleanVerifier>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<BooleanVerifier,Boolean>
public final class BooleanVerifierImpl extends AbstractBooleanVerifier<BooleanVerifier,BooleanValidator> implements BooleanVerifier
Default implementation of BooleanVerifier.
